holdings.infoBox: TYLG is an equity ETF with a total of 76 individual holdings. The top holdings are State Street Technology Select Sector SPDR ETF stock at 53.49%, NVIDIA at 6.26%, Apple at 5.46%, Micron Technology at 3.59%, and Microsoft at 3.54%.

overview.description: The Global X Information Technology Covered Call & Growth ETF (TYLG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund tracks an index that holds S&P 500 technology stocks and sells one-month, at-the-money call options on up to 50% of each stock. TYLG was launched on Nov 21, 2022 and is issued by Global X.
